\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Represents a 2D lookup table for complex functions (text format). 

Stores grid of sampled argument (arg) and function values (fun). 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{mathFunctions_8h_source_l00028}{28}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{mathFunctions_8h_source}{math\+Functions.\+h}}.
